flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lake Washington Institute of Technology rose 30% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.6k → $6.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lake Washington Institute of Technology rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.1k → $12.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lake Washington Institute of Technology fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (42.9% → 37.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lake Washington Institute of Technology fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).
